title: Email Ash at Climate Door re: potential PE intros — send investment criteria
narrative: Ash (ash@climatedoor.com, Climate Door) left a voicemail ~5 days ago (around Apr 11) saying he has companies looking for a private equity partner and wants to make an introduction. He gave his email for follow-up. Action: reply with Sidecar's investment criteria, ask whether any of the companies he has in mind look like a fit, and if so propose getting a call on the calendar to meet. Thank him for thinking of us and for reaching out.
